narrative:
Shalersville Townshp township has 3,389 registered voters, with 62.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
